ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_cards" (
  "production_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production card */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production card */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production card */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the production card was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the production card was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_steps" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production step */,
  "production_card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production card the step belongs to */,
  "step_date" TEXT /* Date of the production step */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production step */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the production step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the production step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the production step was last updated */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the step is completed */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step in the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_steps_production_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_card_id") REFERENCES production_cards ("production_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_steps_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES production_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the production process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production process */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the production process (e.g., sowing, fertilization, germination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, farm worker, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES production_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "production_card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production card the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the production data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_history_production_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_card_id") REFERENCES production_cards ("production_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "production_card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production card the data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual production data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_production_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_card_id") REFERENCES production_cards ("production_card_id")
)
